zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Wogan於1417年出生在威爾士布洛可爾皮可頓時，她的父親Sir John Wogan43歲，母親Margaret Preston38歲。她於1435年之後與Sir Henry Wogan在艾歐洛結婚。她去世於1460年在英國威爾斯布洛可爾皮可頓 卡素享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wogan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh, English, and Irish (Dublin): from the Old Welsh personal name Guoccaun, which derives from the ancestor of Modern Welsh gogawn ‘honour, glory’. In Middle Welsh it became Gwogon and Gwogan and was adopted as a surname by a south Pembrokeshire Anglo-Norman family in the normanized or Anglicized pronunciation Wogan. Compare Cadogan . In Ireland the name has been Gaelicized as Úgán.
History: A family of this name settled in County Kildare following the Anglo-Norman invasion of the 12th century.

variants.name: Ogan
meanings: Irish: of Welsh origin, a variant of Wogan , found Gaelicized as Úgán.

variants.name: Vogan
meanings: Irish: of Welsh origin, a variant of   Wogan  .

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Glamorgan) and Irish (of Welsh origin): from the Old Welsh personal name Catgucaun, Catguocawn, modernized as Cadwgon. It is composed of cad ‘battle’ + gogawn ‘honour, glory’. See also Wogan . The surname is stressed, like its Welsh original, on the penultimate syllable, hence its occasional development to Duggan .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Catheryn
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Wogan was born in 1417, in Picton, Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, Sir John Wogan, was 43 and her mother, Margaret Preston, was 38. She married Sir Henry Wogan after 1435, in Europe. She died in 1460, in Picton Castle, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Wogan(이)가 1417년 웨일스 p브로케실르 피크턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Wogan(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Preston(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1435년 이후 우럽에서 Sir Henry Wogan(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 피크턴 카스틀에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Wogan родилась в 1417 г. в местности пиктон, пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Sir John Wogan было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Preston, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Henry Wogan после 1435 г. в местности Европа. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности пиктон кастл, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.
